Bob Dylan
1992.03.23
State Theatre
Sydney
New South Wales,Australia

2 Most Of The Time 
3 All Along The Watchtower

5 Stuck Inside Of Mobile With The Memphis Blues Again 
6 She Belongs To Me 
7 Maggie's Farm

9 Little Moses (acoustic)
10 Female Rambling Sailor (acoustic)

2 Cat's In The Well 
3 I'll Remember You 
4 The Times They Are A-Changin' (acoustic w band)

Thanks everybody! That was a song about one of those contemporary subjects, buffalo!
